children.heading: .—Requirement
children.label: a .—Requirement
children.text: The Secretary shall establish a uniform system to service the Federal credit instruments made available under the TIFIA program.
the costs of services of expert firms retained pursuant to subsection (d); and
all or a portion of the costs to the Federal Government of servicing the Federal credit instruments.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: The Secretary may appoint a financial entity to assist the Secretary in servicing the Federal credit instruments.

children.heading: .—Duties
children.label: 2 .—Duties
children.text: A servicer appointed under paragraph (1) shall act as the agent for the Secretary.

children.heading: .—Fee
children.label: 3 .—Fee
children.text: A servicer appointed under paragraph (1) shall receive a servicing fee, subject to approval by the Secretary.

children.heading: .—Assistance From Expert Firms
children.label: d .—Assistance From Expert Firms
children.text: The Secretary may retain the services of expert firms, including counsel, in the field of municipal and project finance to assist in the underwriting and servicing of Federal credit instruments.

children.heading: .—Expedited Processing
children.label: e .—Expedited Processing
children.text: The Secretary shall implement procedures and measures to economize the time and cost involved in obtaining approval and the issuance of credit assistance under the TIFIA program.

children.heading: .—Reservation of funds
children.label: 1 .—Reservation of funds
children.text: Of the funds made available to carry out the TIFIA program for each fiscal year, and after the set aside under section 608(a)(6), not less than $2,000,000 shall be made available for the Secretary to use in lieu of fees collected under subsection (b) for projects under the TIFIA program having eligible project costs that are reasonably anticipated not to equal or exceed $75,000,000.

children.heading: .—Release of funds
children.label: 2 .—Release of funds
children.text: Any funds not used under paragraph (1) in a fiscal year shall be made available on October 1 of the following fiscal year to provide credit assistance to any project under the TIFIA program.
